headlines.title: Natural raises $30M to reinvent payments for AI agents — and take on Stripe
Inference startup Infinity raises $15M from Touring Capital, OpenAI and Anthropic researchers
Gritt, which is developing an AI system that helps build infrastructure like solar panels, emerges from stealth with a $26M Series A and $34M in total funding (Tim Fernholz/TechCrunch)
Kimi K3 marks the arrival of frontier open-weight models, and the Kimi team has incredible culture and freedom of expression within a GPU-limited environment (Nathan Lambert/Interconnects AI)
Closing The Series A Gap Is The Next Great Opportunity For Black Founders In The AI Era
'If you're not AI-native, you're not getting funded': European fintech's H1 funding figures
Dell Technologies Capital: How To Build A Deep-Tech Startup For A Market That Isn’t Ready Yet And Why AI Won’t Kill SaaS
Sources: BlackRock leads a $12B+ debt sale for Meta's new El Paso data center, as Meta signs a lease for a BlackRock-backed data-center project in Pennsylvania (Wall Street Journal)
Ant International raises $1.2bn to fund its payments push beyond China
Samsung creates a CEO-led robotics division to chase humanoid robots
Sources: China is weighing tightening AI and chip tech export controls and is consulting leading domestic AI companies, in a bid to slow advanced tech exports (Financial Times)
A profile of Sarah Guo, Greylock's youngest GP before she founded Conviction in 2022, which has since backed six of the 21 AI-native companies now worth $10B+ (Dom Cooke/Colossus)
SpaceX in your index fund, explained
The Space Force is now seeking to buy up to $30 billion in rocket launches
A single AI agent conversation can look perfect and still be broken, leaders from LangChain, Conviva and CoreWeave said at VB Transform 2026
Protesters confront Microsoft CSO over carbon goals and AI, disrupting climate event
UK data center startup Nscale bets big on Bellevue for U.S. engineering hub amid AI boom
Safety guardrails blocked Hugging Face's defenders, not the attacker, when an AI agent breached its systems
15 anti-fraud startups to watch in 2026, according to investors
Etzioni on AI: Uncle Sam wants a stake in leading AI companies — what could possibly go wrong?
Agent swarms and the new model economics
UK PM Andy Burnham abolishes the Department for Science, Innovation, and Tech and elevates UK AI Minister Kanishka Narayan, who oversees AISI, to attend cabinet (Philippa Wain/BBC)
Kanishka Narayan becomes the UK’s first cabinet-level AI minister
America needs to stop getting shocked by Chinese AI
